Here is what was found and what was added under `.specstory/`.

### Where chats/sessions live (this machine)

| Layer | Location | What it holds |
|--------|-----------|----------------|
| **Transcripts (actual turns)** | `~/.cursor/projects/Users-tusharsaini-CursorAI-training-Phase-2/agent-transcripts/<composerId>/<composerId>.jsonl` | Full agent/chat JSONL (user + assistant messages, tools, etc.). |
| **Global session metadata** | `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb` → key `composer.composerHeaders` | Titles, `composerId`, created/updated times, mode, subtitles. |
| **Workspace DB** | `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/workspaceStorage/be83a8f1ea565811eddd876392724054/state.vscdb` | Layout + small `composer.composerData` blob — **not** the full transcript. |

This is **not** browser `localStorage` / `sessionStorage`; Cursor uses app data under `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/` and `~/.cursor/`.

### What was saved in `.specstory/`

1. **`cursor-sessions-INDEX.md`** — Index of all exports plus the storage notes above.  
2. **`cursor-sessions/`** — **16** Markdown files (`01-…` through `16-…`), each with YAML front matter (title, ids, timestamps) and the conversation in Markdown (user/assistant sections, tool calls as JSON blocks).  
3. **`_composer_headers_raw.json`** — Snapshot of `composer.composerHeaders` used for titles/dates.  
4. **`scripts/export_cursor_sessions_to_markdown.py`** — Re-run to refresh after new chats:

   `python3 .specstory/scripts/export_cursor_sessions_to_markdown.py`

Only **16** JSONL transcripts existed for this Phase 2 project; older threads that appear only in SpecStory’s own history (under `.specstory/history/`) were already Markdown and were not duplicated.

If you want **every** Composer globally (other folders/workspaces), say so and we can extend the script to scan additional `agent-transcripts` paths or filter `composer.composerHeaders` by workspace.

---

move all data from existing @.specstory/cursor-sessions/ to @.specstory/history/  and try to rename all .md files which is in @.specstory/cursor-sessions/ with format (yyyy-mm-dd-{first user_query})
